story_title: Pika Labs and the Discord Launch Playbook

shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch watching users generate and share AI videos in a Discord server on a cream background.
assets.caption: Hatch watching users generate and share AI videos in a Discord server on a cream background.
assets.prompt: Pika Labs and the Discord Launch Playbook | hero: Hatch mascot (HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) standing in front of a Discord-style chat interface filled with small video thumbnails. Users are posting prompts and receiving video results. The scene reads as: a live, unfiltered quality demonstration. Cream background. Hatch expression excited. No speech bubble. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.

assets.prompt: Pika Labs and the Discord Launch Playbook | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose, gesturing at two side-by-side panels. Left panel: a polished curated demo reel labeled "What an investor sees." Right panel: a messy Discord feed of video thumbnails from real users labeled "What the community sees." Hatch clearly prefers the right. Cream background. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. assets.prompt: Pika Labs and the Discord Launch Playbook | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose, looking at a flow diagram. Step 1: "User types prompt in Discord." Step 2: "Video generated — visible to all 500K members." Step 3: "Good outputs shared to Twitter." Step 4: "New users join to try it." Arrow from Step 4 back to Step 1, forming a flywheel. Cream background. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker.
